Name: departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" LIMIT 2) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.r.employees"."employees" AS "employees") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root.r.employees"), '[]') AS "employees" FROM (WITH "_root.r.employees.base" AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON ("user_id") * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "public"."user_departments"."department_id" IS NOT NULL AND "department_id" = "_root.base"."id" ORDER BY "user_id" ASC LIMIT 3) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.employees.base"."user_id" AS "user_id", "_root.r.employees.base"."department_id" AS "department_id") AS "_e")) AS "_root.r.employees" FROM "_root.r.employees.base") AS "_root.r.employees") AS "_root.r.employees" ON ('true')) AS "_root"
